en: When one of you has a grievance against another, does he dare go to law before the unrighteous instead of the saints?
zh: 你們中間有人和弟兄起了爭執，怎敢告到不義的人面前，卻不告在聖徒面前呢？

en: Or do you not know that the saints will judge the world? And if the world is to be judged by you, are you incompetent to try trivial cases?
zh: 你們不知道聖徒要審判世界嗎？既然世界要由你們來審判，難道你們不配審判這些最小的事嗎？

en: Do you not know that we are to judge angels? How much more, then, matters pertaining to this life!
zh: 你們不知道我們要審判天使嗎？何況今生的事呢？

en: So if you have such cases, why do you lay them before those who have no standing in the church?
zh: 你們既然要審判今生的事，為甚麼讓教會不重視的人來審判呢？

en: I say this to your shame. Can it be that there is no one among you wise enough to settle a dispute between the brothers,
zh: 我說這話，是要使你們羞愧。難道你們中間沒有一個有智慧的人，能夠審判弟兄之間的事嗎？

en: but brother goes to law against brother, and that before unbelievers?
zh: 你們竟然是弟兄告弟兄，而且告到不信的人面前去嗎？

en: To have lawsuits at all with one another is already a defeat for you. Why not rather suffer wrong? Why not rather be defrauded?
zh: 你們彼此告狀，已經是你們的失敗了。為甚麼不寧願受委屈呢？為甚麼不甘心吃虧呢？

en: But you yourselves wrong and defraud- even your own brothers!
zh: 但你們反倒使人受委屈，叫人吃虧，而且他們就是你們的弟兄。

en: Do you not know that the unrighteous will not inherit the kingdom of God? Do not be deceived: neither the sexually immoral, nor idolaters, nor adulterers, nor men who practice homosexuality,
zh: 你們不知道不義的人不能承受 神的國嗎？不要自欺，無論是行淫亂的、拜偶像的、姦淫的、作孌童的、親男色的、

en: nor thieves, nor the greedy, nor drunkards, nor revilers, nor swindlers will inherit the kingdom of God.
zh: 偷竊的、貪心的、醉酒的、辱罵人的或勒索的，都不能承受 神的國。

en: And such were some of you. But you were washed, you were sanctified, you were justified in the name of the Lord Jesus Christ and by the Spirit of our God.
zh: 你們有些人從前也是這樣的，但現在藉著我們主耶穌基督的名，靠著我們 神的靈，都已經洗淨了，聖潔了，稱義了。

en: "All things are lawful for me," but not all things are helpful. "All things are lawful for me," but I will not be enslaved by anything.
zh: 甚麼事我都可以作，但不是都有益處。甚麼事我都可以作，但我不要受任何事的轄制。

en: "Food is meant for the stomach and the stomach for food"- and God will destroy both one and the other. The body is not meant for sexual immorality, but for the Lord, and the Lord for the body.
zh: 食物是為了肚腹，肚腹是為了食物；但 神卻要把這兩樣都廢掉。身體不是為了淫亂，而是為了主，主也是為了身體。

en: And God raised the Lord and will also raise us up by his power.
zh: 神不但使主復活了，也要用他的能力使我們復活。

en: Do you not know that your bodies are members of Christ? Shall I then take the members of Christ and make them members of a prostitute? Never!
zh: 你們不知道你們的身體就是基督的肢體嗎？這樣，我們可以把基督的肢體當作娼妓的肢體嗎？當然不可以！

en: Or do you not know that he who is joined to a prostitute becomes one body with her? For, as it is written, "The two will become one flesh."
zh: 你們不知道那跟娼妓苟合的，就是與她成為一體了嗎？因為經上說：“二人要成為一體。”

en: But he who is joined to the Lord becomes one spirit with him.
zh: 但那與主聯合的，就是與他成為一靈了。

en: Flee from sexual immorality. Every other sin a person commits is outside the body, but the sexually immoral person sins against his own body.
zh: 你們要逃避淫亂的事。人所犯的，無論是甚麼罪，都是在身體以外，唯有行淫亂的，是觸犯自己的身體。

en: Or do you not know that your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit within you, whom you have from God? You are not your own,
zh: 你們不知道你們的身體就是那位住在你們裡面的聖靈的殿嗎？這聖靈是你們從 神那裡領受的。你們不是屬於自己的，

en: for you were bought with a price. So glorify God in your body.
zh: 因為你們是用重價買來的。所以你們務要用自己的身體榮耀 神。
